title: MaxStacks
description: MaxStacks lets server admins instantly set all stackable items to 99 per slot with a single command.
body:
**MaxStacks** is a lightweight Paper plugin that overrides the max stack size of all stackable items to 99, giving players more inventory breathing room with zero client mods required. **Key Features** - Raise all 16 and 64 stack items to a max of 99 per slot - Toggle on or off at any time with a simple command - Instantly applies to all online players on enable/disable - Automatically applies to players who join while enabled - Fully server-side — no client mods required - Lightweight and server-friendly **Functionality** In vanilla Minecraft, inventory management can feel tight — especially with items that cap at 16. MaxStacks uses Paper 1.21's native stack size API to cleanly override these limits to 99 without any hacks or workarounds. Toggle it on, and every eligible item in every online player's inventory is updated instantly. Toggle it off, and everything reverts to vanilla defaults automatically. **Commands & Permissions** | Command | Description | Permission | |---|---|---| | `/maxstacks enable` | Enable 99-stack mode | `maxstacks.use` | | `/maxstacks disable` | Disable and revert to vanilla | `maxstacks.use` | | `/maxstacks status` | Check if currently enabled | `maxstacks.use` | **Installation** MaxStacks is a server-side plugin. Drop it in your `plugins` folder and restart your server. No configuration files or client installation required. **Disclaimer** MaxStacks targets items with a vanilla max stack of 16 or 64. Unstackable items (tools, armor, etc.) are not affected.

🛠 Support & Bug Reports

Found a bug or need help setting up the plugin?
Report issues directly on Discord.
